ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* File path to the product image */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the product (active/inactive) */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was created */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was last updated */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "product_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit, a unique identifier for inventory management */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product for shipping and handling */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (length, width, height) */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate applicable to the product */,
  "seo_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for search engine optimization */,
  "seo_description" TEXT /* Meta description for SEO */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is featured */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "seo_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for search engine optimization */,
  "seo_description" TEXT /* Meta description for SEO */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the product image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the product image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image, useful for SEO and accessibility */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., main, thumbnail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "restock_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for when to restock the product */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product for restocking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Cost of shipping */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "item_price" TEXT /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Amount of tax applied to the item */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Amount of discount applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer registered */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the customer review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was written */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review has been marked as helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product feature */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  "is_key_feature" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the feature is a key feature (important for marketing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_features_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant (e.g., Color, Size) */,
  "variant_value" TEXT /* Value of the variant (e.g., Blue, Medium) */,
  "variant_image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image specific to the variant */,
  "variant_inventory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inventory record for the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_variant_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage discount offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "minimum_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity required to apply the promotion */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the promotion is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_promotions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
